ContentSecurityPolicy.ContentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src 'self'; frame-src https://www.google.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
